minimum_data_contract.scope: Only fields required to qualify one simple monthly-or-slower long-only price-based cross-sectional family; shares, market cap, PIT industry and fundamentals remain explicit deferred gaps.
minimum_data_contract.security_unit: One ticker-era common-share record. Ticker eras are never stitched across mergers, symbol changes, or ticker reuse without an independently sourced identity mapping.

availability_rule.daily_bar_research_eligibility: No row may be used before the next verified XNYS session open after trade_date. This is a conservative research eligibility rule and must not be labeled as a provider publication timestamp.
availability_rule.corporate_action_research_eligibility: Use no earlier than the later of a qualified provider availability timestamp and the next verified XNYS session open after ex_date; if provider availability is absent, the action is retrospective-only and cannot form a signal.
availability_rule.sec_fact_research_eligibility: Exact SEC accepted timestamp for the accession, never filing_date alone.

return_rule.no_double_counting: Use raw/split-consistent closes plus explicit cash distributions, or use a verified total-return series, never both.
return_rule.split_rule: Splits change share count and price scale but not portfolio value.
return_rule.delisting_rule: Never delete a failed security. Use an independently sourced terminal cash/recovery value; if absent, stop with INPUT_BLOCKED rather than substitute zero or last close.
return_rule.ticker_change_rule: Close the old ticker era and open a new ticker era; no stitching without independent identity evidence.

known_limitations_to_test: No permanent security or share-class identifier
No explicit delisting return, merger cash, bankruptcy recovery, or ticker-history table
No source publication timestamp per market row
OHLC adjustment convention is not declared in table schema

official_identity_and_pit_crosscheck.use: Former names, filing/accession identity, accepted timestamps, and bounded shares-outstanding/fundamental PIT checks; never treated as a survivor-aware price source.

independent_price_action_crosscheck.provider: Yahoo Finance public historical chart data
independent_price_action_crosscheck.use: Small smoke crosscheck only; route closes immediately on access, terms, shape, or consistency failure.

smoke_gates.source_snapshot_identity: Every response binds provider, exact URL/query, retrieved_at, raw byte count, SHA256, and pinned Dolt commit.
smoke_gates.coverage: All 47 symbols must have an explicit metadata result or an explicit quarantined absence; every required delisted/acquired case must have at least 252 bars or a documented terminal-source failure.
smoke_gates.uniqueness: Zero duplicate symbol-date bars and zero duplicate symbol-ex-date actions after parsing.
smoke_gates.finite_and_ohlc: All required numeric values finite and nonnegative; high >= max(open, close, low), low <= min(open, close, high), volume >= 0.
smoke_gates.corporate_actions: Known split and dividend cases must be present and price/action arithmetic must be internally consistent; merger/delist recovery absence is blocking, not imputed.
smoke_gates.pit: No historical retrieved_at may masquerade as historical provider available_at; SEC facts require accepted timestamps; daily bars are lagged to next verified session for research eligibility.
smoke_gates.conflict_isolation: Cross-source discrepancies above frozen tolerance are quarantined and excluded rather than overwritten.
smoke_gates.cross_source: For at least 15 symbols and 20 overlapping dates, independent raw close values must agree within max(0.01 USD, 10 bp); split ratios and dividend ex-dates must match exactly for named action cases.
smoke_gates.calendar: XNYS sessions must cover the research interval with no duplicate dates and must match all observed full-session dates; unresolved closure or half-day identity is blocking.
smoke_gates.rollback: Writer dry-run and synthetic-copy conflict/idempotency tests must pass before central execution.
smoke_gates.unchanged_database_on_failure: If any blocking gate fails, canonical DB device/inode/size/mtime/SHA256 and WAL absence must remain identical to the pre-smoke snapshot.

forbidden_until_preregistration: current stock recommendation or executable ranking
